parameters.jsCode:
// Generate HTML alert email const data = $input.first().json; const anomalyRows = data.anomalies.map(a => ` ${a.metric} ${a.z_score ? a.z_score.toFixed(2) : 'N/A'} ${a.deviation_percent ? Math.round(a.deviation_percent) + '%' : 'N/A'} ${a.severity.toUpperCase()} `).join(''); const html = `

🚨 Performance Anomaly Alert

Severity: ${data.has_critical ? 'CRITICAL' : 'HIGH'}

${data.model_name}

Checkpoint: ${data.checkpoint}

Anomalies Detected: ${data.anomaly_count}

${anomalyRows}
Metric Z-Score Deviation Severity
View Trend Analysis

Alert generated at: ${new Date(data.analyzed_at).toLocaleString()}

`; return { json: { html, text: `Anomaly Alert: ${data.model_name} - ${data.anomaly_count} anomalies detected` } };

parameters.name: alerts_sent
